title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
